title: oxalis compacta
intro: Oxalis compacta, also known as the purple oxalis or wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its high concentration of oxalic acid. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Oxalis compacta is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, and its leaves and roots can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
